Jalen Goldsinger  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded August 17th, 2019 by Drewinette

  • This mob spawns at +1517, -1589 in the NE part of the zone..
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

He's on Gate Callers faction. He will talk to you at Apprehensive faction.

You say, 'Hail, Jalen Goldsinger'

Jalen Goldsinger says, 'A fine day. Quite murky and quiet, is it not? May your path be filled with fortunes. Be well.'

You say, 'what Crystal of Capturing?'

Jalen Goldsinger says, 'Hrm? A crystal of capturing? Aye. I do know the secret of their making. Not that I would tell you. I will, however, create one for you. Provided you bring some of their components and a large coin reserve, that is. I require a potion of sorrow and 1000 gold coins. A tidy sum, in return for which, I will do you the favor of not asking why you need such a... dark item.'

Hand in the potion and 1000 gold coins (or 100 platinum coins) to receive an Empty Crystal Sphere used in the Erudite Necromancer quest Azrax's Legacy.

Jalen Goldsinger says, 'Excuse me while I add some other items to this mix. There. Finished. Here you go, and thank you for your business.'

Your faction standing with Gate Callers has been adjusted by 3.

Your faction standing with High Guard of Erudin has been adjusted by 1.

Your faction standing with High Council of Erudin has been adjusted by 1.

Your faction standing with Heretics has been adjusted by -1.

You gain experience!

Categories: Templatized | EverQuest
This page last modified 2021-12-12 20:03:38.

Level: 40
Expansion:
Effects Used:Alacrity
Feedback
Major Shielding
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-08-17 15:10:32
Known Loot:
Ornate Defiant Plate Gauntlets
Items Given:
Empty Crystal Sphere

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Azraxs' Legacy

another line related to quest
QuoteReply
# May 28 2022 at 1:07 PM Rating: Excellent
ElrozTAKP
Guru
286 posts
[Sat May 28 15:04:40 2022] You say, 'potion'
[Sat May 28 15:04:40 2022] Jalen Goldsinger says, 'An interesting little concoction. Gorth Bearsoul is the only alchemist I know of who can make such an item. Loud and quite smelly, he is. Not unusual for a barbarian. He calls the icy city of Halas home.'

His Alignment/Faction
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2016 at 8:12 AM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
We did a test of 26 race/class/deity combinations followed by a test of every race a chanter can illusion 2 and conned Jalen and every other faction around him.

His con results were identical to Gate Callers. He gives no faction when killed, and he looks like a chanter... but he seems to be aligned with the magicians..
▲ Page top
Canned Blue

# Oct 10 2011 at 1:28 PM Rating: Good

299 posts
Blue to a 45. Caught me running for PoK book. Fought him at about p1650, n1330.

Dropped Ornate Defiant Plate Guantlets

For a Quest

Jalen is part of the Erudite necromancer quest for the Mantle of the Souls. Nice item, very hard to get...

Edited, Sun Jun 23 07:31:33 2002

Strange

# Jan 27 2002 at 11:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592793169098
143 posts
There are 3 Erudite NPCs in Toxila that con DUBIOSLY to everone good and evil(I checked with many of my chars)

This is one of them, Another is by Docks - looks like Erudine Guard but with Scely Pet, yet he is not a Heretic.

Another one stand by fallen tree near Spires.

There is also 3 new Erudite NPC in palace now in back rooms of bank/city office, that con DUBIOUS to evryone (I have a Ranger, Necro,DRuid, Enchater, Sk) I chekced with all of them

# Jul 26 2001 at 6:58 AM Rating: Default

he has a faction with the reversed freeport milita
▲ Page top
hes a shmuck
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 8:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was a lvl 20 erudite mage. I was on my way to erudin from the tp ring and all of a sudden this fruit monkey jumps me. he punches me twice for 3 damage each and then he casts some crazy spell on me that runs me around the zone for the next minute. with this spell on me I couldn't move the mouse, move myself, use any of my command buttons, or the backspace button (I could type but I couldn't deleat what I had said).

so then I'm sitting there right in front of him, I cant move, and he and his pet aren't attacking me. once the spell broke I ran Like hell for the gaurds... he didnt' follow me.

What I dont understand is why did he attack me in the first place, we're both erudite casters, and I haven't screwed up any factions except for orcs and fp millitia. when I was in the eridite palace the guys in the enchanters guild still liked me... so whats wrong with this guy?
▲ Page top
Naw

Anonymous
Blue to me at 44, glowered dub to Human Mage (agnostic with reversed FP and Q faction)

no way this guy is lvl 50 he conned yellow to me at 39. im pretty sure i remember him conning amiable as an erudite enchanter.
